# Support

## How to Get Help

If you need help with Sensible-Analytics projects, here are the best ways to get assistance:

### 1. Check the Documentation
Each repository has comprehensive documentation in its README.md file and often includes:
- Getting started guides
- API references
- Example code snippets
- Troubleshooting sections

### 2. Search Existing Issues
Before opening a new issue, please search existing issues to see if your question has already been asked or answered.

### 3. Open an Issue
If you've found a bug or have a feature request, please open an issue in the relevant repository:
- Use the "Bug report" template for bugs
- Use the "Feature request" template for new features
- Use the "Question" template for general inquiries

### 4. GitHub Discussions
Join our community discussions for:
- General questions and help
- Sharing projects built with Sensible-Analytics
- Discussing ideas and roadmap
- Showcasing your work

### 5. Email Support
For urgent or sensitive matters, you can email:
- General support: support@sensible-analytics.com
- Security issues: security@sensible-analytics.com
- Licensing inquiries: licensing@sensible-analytics.com

## Response Times

We aim to respond to all inquiries within:
- Issues: Within 2 business days
- Security reports: Within 48 hours
- Email support: Within 1 business day

## Contributing to Support

Help us improve our support by:
- Providing clear, detailed issue reports
- Sharing solutions that worked for you
- Helping answer questions in discussions
- Suggesting improvements to our documentation

Thank you for using Sensible-Analytics!
